channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Understanding ARC Raiders Matchmaking: Playstyle, Fairness, and Enjoyment
item.description: The ARC Raiders team has provided a detailed explanation of their matchmaking system, addressing both player concerns and misconceptions. The system is designed to balance fairness and enjoyment, ensu...

item.title: May 27, 2026 Declared National Holiday in Observance of Eid'l Adha
item.description: Malacañang Palace has officially announced that May 27, 2026, which falls on a Wednesday, will be a regular holiday nationwide in observance of Eid'l Adha, also known as the Feast of Sacrifice. This d...

item.description: Siwelele goalkeeper Ricardo Goss has expressed his ambition to represent South Africa at the upcoming 2026 Fifa World Cup. With Bafana Bafana drawn in Group A alongside Mexico, South Korea, and the Cz...

item.title: US Congress Evaluates Tanzania Relations Amid Electoral and Human Rights Concerns
item.description: The United States Congress is carrying out a careful review of its relationship with Tanzania after concerns about Tanzania’s recent elections and growing human rights issues. Lawmakers are questionin...

item.title: Donald Trump undecided about attending son Donald Jr's wedding
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has left uncertainty over whether he will attend the upcoming wedding of his son, Donald Trump Jr, in the Bahamas. When questioned about the event, Trump gave a non-co...

item.title: FIFA's 2026 World Cup: High Ticket Prices Drive Record Revenue Amid Criticism Over Spending Priorities
item.description: For the 2026 World Cup, FIFA is set to generate record revenue, potentially exceeding $15 billion, largely due to sharply increased ticket prices and the introduction of dynamic pricing. Category 1 ti...

item.title: Rising Electricity Costs Despite Lower Consumption in South Africa
item.description: South Africans are facing steadily rising electricity costs even as their actual usage declines, according to a recent light paper by residential solar provider GoSolr. The report highlights that the ...

item.title: Ash Moloney switches from decathlon to 400m hurdles while Cedric Dubler continues in athletics
item.description: Ash Moloney, who won a bronze medal in the decathlon at the Tokyo Olympics, has taken a bold step by leaving the 10-discipline event to focus on the 400m hurdles. The 26-year-old made the switch due t...

item.title: Congress Protests NEET-UG Paper Leak, Demands Resignation of Education Minister and NTA Dissolution

item.title: Legal Representative Says Bato Can Be Arrested Without Legal Barriers
item.description: The legal representative of victims of extrajudicial killings (EJKs) has confirmed that there are no legal obstacles preventing the arrest of former police chief Ronald 'Bato' Dela Rosa. This statemen...

item.title: Senator John Cornyn Faces Public Ridicule for Dairy Queen Campaign Stop in Texas
item.description: Senator John Cornyn of Texas, currently campaigning in a primary runoff, faced widespread mockery after posting about a visit to a Dairy Queen in Sealy, Texas. Cornyn shared a photo with an employee a...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns aim for CAF Champions League triumph in Rabat
